backstory.original: Makos grew up on the streets with a desire to rise above it all. He knows that his innate connection to infernal power is his key to achieving his goals, no matter the cost.
backstory.display: 马科斯在街头长大，他渴望超脱这一切。他知道自己和地狱力量之间与生俱来的联系是实现自己目标的关键，无论付出什么代价。

description.original: A beam of green crackling energy streaks towards a random enemy.
description.display: 发射一束绿色的能量命中一名随机敌人。

description.original: A sphere of negative energy ripples out from a random enemy.
description.display: 从一名随机敌人身上爆发出一个负极能量球。

longDescription.original: A sphere of negative energy ripples out from a random enemy, causing that enemy and all other enemies near it to take heavy damage.
longDescription.display: 从一名随机敌人身上爆发出一个负极能量球，使该敌人及附近的所有其他敌人受到高额伤害。

description.desc: Makos deals $amount% more damage. When $source lands the killing blow on an Enemy, they drop $amount___2% more Gold.
使马科斯的伤害提高 $amount%。当$source击杀敌人时，额外掉落 $amount___2% 金币。

specializationDescription.original: Makos' dark pact with his fiendish patron results in monsters killed by him dropping more gold.
specializationDescription.display: 马科斯与炼狱生物守护者的黑暗契约使他杀死的怪物掉落更多金币。

tipText.original: Enemies that Makos lands the killing blow on drop additional gold.
tipText.display: 死于马科斯之手的敌人掉落额外金币。

description.desc: Increase the damage of Champions not adjacent to $source by $(amount)%
不与$source相邻的勇士提升 $(amount)% 伤害

specializationDescription.original: Makos' dark pact allows him to bless those who are not next to him, causing them to do more damage.
specializationDescription.display: 马科斯的黑暗契约使他能够祝福不与他相邻的人，提高其造成的伤害。

tipText.original: Champions that are not adjacent to Makos deal additional damage. Make sure he's not adjacent to other damage dealers to increase their damage.
tipText.display: 不与马科斯相邻的勇士造成额外伤害。确保他不与其他伤害输出者相邻，以提高其伤害。

description.desc: Increase the effect of Dark Luck by $amount% for each Evil or Warlock Champion in the formation
阵型中每位邪恶阵营或邪术师勇士，均使厄运的技能效果提高 $amount%
Increase the effect of Dark Blessing by $amount% if $source is not on the edge of the formation
如果$source未处于阵型边缘，则黑暗祝福的效果提升 $amount%

description.original: Who's your pact with, then?
description.display: 那么你和谁签了契约呢？

description.original: Power never comes without a cost.
description.display: 力量从来都是要付出代价的。

description.original: Flights of fancy, or true heroics. They all end the same way.
description.display: 奇妙的幻想，或真正的英雄主义，它们都以同样的方式结束。

description.original: We must defeat those who will take advantage!
description.display: 我们必须打败那些步步紧逼的人！

description.original: The dead have no need of their coin.
description.display: 死人就不需要硬币了。

description.original: Those who enter into a pact with Arikas will find riches and pain.
description.display: 与阿里卡斯签订契约者将会得到财富和痛苦。

description.original: Leader or not, we're all dead if we don't deal with the lich.
description.display: 不管是不是首领，如果不对付巫妖我们都得死。

description.original: My powers increase.
description.display: 我的力量在增强。

description.original: I call upon the Flames of Phlegethos!
description.display: 我召唤弗莱格索斯之焰！

description.original: A few sparks are a beginning, but they're certainly not an end.
description.display: 星星之火可以燎原。

description.original: We're going to need to do better than this.
description.display: 这样的威力远远不足够。

description.original: Where there's smoke...
description.display: 有烟雾的地方就有......

description.original: This ought to draw their attention.
description.display: 这应该能够吸引到他们的注意力了。

description.original: There's something a little off about this dagger.
description.display: 这把匕首有点不对劲。

description.original: Yeah, this dagger is clearly evil. But it does my bidding, so it's not all bad.
description.display: 对，此匕首邪得很。但是它服从我的命令，所以算是亦正亦邪。

description.original: Allows me to focus my fiendish magic.
description.display: 它可以帮助我引导恶魔法术。

description.original: I'll do whatever it takes to achieve my goals.
description.display: 我不惜代价也要达成目标。

description.original: Holds enough components for a few hours of intense spellcasting.
description.display: 可以容纳施法数个小时的法术成分。

description.original: There's a hidden compartment in the back for even more components.
description.display: 袋子后侧有个隐蔽的口袋可供容纳更多的法术成分。

description.original: Finding black leather dye is extremely difficult. Luckily, I know a Fiend or two.
description.display: 黑色颜料是很难找到的。所幸的是，我认识一些炼狱生物。

description.original: Demon hide is especially rare. They generally don't like to give it up.
description.display: 恶魔皮革是极其罕见的。因为它们从不会轻易认栽。

description.original: They... they tore my cape! The nerve!
description.display: 他们......他们撕破了我的披肩！真是好大的胆子！

description.original: I'm really still quite evil, once you get to know me.
description.display: 你要是深入认识我的话，就会发现我还是挺邪恶的。

description.original: Magnificent, much like myself!
description.display: 非常的高贵，就跟我一样！

description.original: Don't worry, they weren't very nice souls to begin with.
description.display: 放心吧，这些灵魂生前都不是好人。

description.original: This has no real value to me. I've grown so far beyond its meager power.
description.display: 对我没有实用价值。我的能力早已超越它的级别。

description.original: A simple robe for a simple warlock. I've already outgrown it.
description.display: 一般邪术师穿的一般般的长袍。我早就告别那种水平了。

description.original: Finally, a robe worthy of my great power.
description.display: 终于找到一件配得上我实力的长袍了。

description.original: The ends justify the means. I'll do whatever it takes.
description.display: 为达目的，我可以不择手段。

description.original: You can't make an omelette without burning a few belts.
description.display: 不烧腰带焉得煎鸡蛋。

description.original: For some reason, my patron seems to like it when I wear black.
description.display: 不知为何，我的守护神特别喜欢我黑色的穿着。

description.original: A rare gift from my patron, Arikas. It serves me well.
description.display: 这是我的守护神阿里卡斯送给我的罕见礼物。非常的实用。

description.original: An exquisite belt for those of us with fiendish tastes.
description.display: 这是专门为我们这些口味独特的人打造的稀有腰带。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Tiefling Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a INT score of 11 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a STR score of 11 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Evil Champions by $(amount)%

display.name: 浪荡首领
display.description: 不管是不是首领，如果不对付巫妖我们都得死。

display.name: 火花项链
display.description: 星星之火可以燎原。

display.name: 闪烁项链
display.description: 这样的威力远远不足够。

original.name: Necklace of Flame
original.description: Where there's smoke...

display.name: 火焰项链
display.description: 有烟雾的地方就有......

original.name: Golden Necklace of Fireballs
original.description: This ought to draw their attention.

display.name: 火球术黄金项链
display.description: 这应该能够吸引到他们的注意力了。

original.name: Suspicious Dagger
original.description: There's something a little off about this dagger.

display.name: 可疑的匕首
display.description: 这把匕首有点不对劲。

original.name: Evil Dagger
original.description: Yeah, this dagger is clearly evil. But it does my bidding, so it's not all bad.

display.name: 邪恶的匕首
display.description: 对，此匕首邪得很。但是它服从我的命令，所以算是亦正亦邪。

original.name: Twisted Dagger Focus
original.description: Allows me to focus my fiendish magic.

display.name: 变态的匕首器材
display.description: 它可以帮助我引导恶魔法术。

original.name: Demonic Focus of Infernal Power
original.description: I'll do whatever it takes to achieve my goals.

display.name: 炼狱法术之恶魔器材
display.description: 我不惜代价也要达成目标。

original.name: Small Cloth Pouch
original.description: Holds enough components for a few hours of intense spellcasting.

display.name: 小型布袋
display.description: 可以容纳施法数个小时的法术成分。

original.name: Stitched Leather Pouch
original.description: There's a hidden compartment in the back for even more components.

display.name: 缝补过的皮袋
display.description: 袋子后侧有个隐蔽的口袋可供容纳更多的法术成分。

original.name: Dyed Leather Pouch
original.description: Finding black leather dye is extremely difficult. Luckily, I know a Fiend or two.

display.name: 染色的皮袋
display.description: 黑色颜料是很难找到的。所幸的是，我认识一些炼狱生物。

original.name: Gilded Demon Hide Pouch
original.description: Demon hide is especially rare. They generally don't like to give it up.

display.name: 镀金恶魔皮袋
display.description: 恶魔皮革是极其罕见的。因为它们从不会轻易认栽。

original.name: Torn Cape
original.description: They... they tore my cape! The nerve!

display.name: 撕裂的披肩
display.description: 他们......他们撕破了我的披肩！真是好大的胆子！

original.name: Dark Cape
original.description: I'm really still quite evil, once you get to know me.

display.name: 暗黑披肩
display.description: 你要是深入认识我的话，就会发现我还是挺邪恶的。

original.name: Magnificent Cape
original.description: Magnificent, much like myself!

display.name: 高贵的披肩
display.description: 非常的高贵，就跟我一样！

original.name: Exquisite Cape of Souls
original.description: Don't worry, they weren't very nice souls to begin with.

display.name: 精美的灵魂披肩
display.description: 放心吧，这些灵魂生前都不是好人。

original.name: Basic Warlock's Robe
original.description: This has no real value to me. I've grown so far beyond its meager power.

display.name: 基础邪术师长袍
display.description: 对我没有实用价值。我的能力早已超越它的级别。

original.name: Apprentice's Robe
original.description: A simple robe for a simple warlock. I've already outgrown it.

display.name: 学徒长袍
display.description: 一般邪术师穿的一般般的长袍。我早就告别那种水平了。

original.name: Gold Stitched Robe
original.description: Finally, a robe worthy of my great power.

display.name: 金丝长袍
display.description: 终于找到一件配得上我实力的长袍了。

original.name: Tasselled Robes of Justification
original.description: The ends justify the means. I'll do whatever it takes.

display.name: 正当之流苏长袍
display.description: 为达目的，我可以不择手段。

original.name: Charred Belt
original.description: You can't make an omelette without burning a few belts.

display.name: 烧焦的腰带
display.description: 不烧腰带焉得煎鸡蛋。

original.name: Blackened Belt
original.description: For some reason, my patron seems to like it when I wear black.

display.name: 黑化的腰带
display.description: 不知为何，我的守护神特别喜欢我黑色的穿着。

original.name: Fine Acolyte's Belt
original.description: A rare gift from my patron, Arikas. It serves me well.

display.name: 精良的追随者腰带
display.description: 这是我的守护神阿里卡斯送给我的罕见礼物。非常的实用。

original.name: Skirted Belt of Demons
original.description: An exquisite belt for those of us with fiendish tastes.

display.name: 恶魔的裙式腰带
display.description: 这是专门为我们这些口味独特的人打造的稀有腰带。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
使所有男性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Tiefling Champions by $(amount)%
使所有提夫林勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a INT score of 11 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位智力大于等于 11 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a STR score of 11 or higher in the formation
阵型中每有一位力量大于等于 11 的勇士，所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Evil Champions by $(amount)%
使所有邪恶阵营勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%
